summary_en: 1,002,300 shares acquired (6.76% of S/O), ¥749.94M total (99.99% of ¥750M authorization), via open market and ToSTNeT-3. Execution window Nov 4, 2025 – May 29, 2026. Final block May 1–29, 2026: 580,100 shares, ¥464.37M. Buyback completed as authorized by board Oct 31, 2025.
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Acquisition and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
Nippon Felt completed its treasury stock acquisition program on May 29, 2026. The board authorized the buyback on October 31, 2025, with an upper limit of 1,200,000 shares (6.76% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) and ¥750 million, over the period November 4, 2025 through May 29, 2026.

Cumulative execution through May 29, 2026 totaled 1,002,300 shares for ¥749,941,000, consuming 99.99% of the authorized budget. The final tranche (May 1–29, 2026) acquired 580,100 shares for ¥464,366,300 via open market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and ToSTNeT-3 (off-market) transactions.

The program is now closed. All acquisitions were effected under the authority of Article 459(1) of the Companies Act and the company's Articles of Incorporation (Article 32).
